function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to OCR all bills related to Foundry. Search located three matching bill records, confirmed against canonical entity 10_entities/cast/foundry.md. Each target bill contained all required fields and line items per finance-record-frontmatter schema, enabling complete frontmatter extraction without guessing. After successful updates, inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows.
